# modelParameters

**Instance Property**

The model configuration parameters the activity classifier used during its training session.

## Declaration

```swift
nonisolated(unsafe) let modelParameters: MLActivityClassifier.ModelParameters
```

## Inspecting an activity classifier model

- **model**: The underlying Core ML model of the activity classifier stored in memory.
- **featureColumns**: The names of the feature columns the activity classifier used during its training session.
- **labelColumn**: The name of the label column the activity classifier used during its training session.
- **recordingFileColumn**: The name of the column that contains the data files the activity classifier used during its training session.
